warnings: Gaming flags are MET observations. CDE/SEL/GOV retain authority for any control or enforcement response.
Each flag references an artifact and a specific anti-gaming rule.
failure_prevented: Improvements being claimed via metric gaming — green status with weak evidence, improved metric without changed failure rate, candidate closure without owner artifact refs.
signal_improved: Each gaming pattern is named with a rule_id, evidence_refs, and a next_recommended_input.

gaming_observations.observation: Materialization observations marked 'observed' must include owner_artifact_refs.
gaming_observations.next_recommended_input: Continue to require owner_artifact_refs on every observed materialization row.

gaming_observations.observation: Trend/frequency state stays unknown until 3 comparable cases are present.
API blocks degrade to 'unknown' when artifacts are missing — never to 0.
